title: inula scabridula
intro: Inula scabridula, also known as the spiny knapweed, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Inula scabridula is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
